name: Soccer League
author: Poki
description: Soccer League is a fast-paced 5v5 football game made for intense matches, sweet revenge, and climbing the ranks! Play the match, unlock insane super abilities, challenge smart bots, and customize your look with jerseys, boots, and emotes. Settle the score with one-tap rematches and dominate the leaderboards. Play, lose, rematch, win, repeat. Are you ready to rule the pitch? How to play Soccer League? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Camera: Use the mouse to adjust the camera Shoot: Hold and release the left click button Dribble: the space bar Sliding: E Pass: R Who created Soccer League? Soccer League is created by OnRush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io , Eat the world , Shipo.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , Burger Bounty , MagicLand.io , Fishing League , Sprint League | Brainrot Tsunami and TexasWorm.io ! How can I play Soccer League for free? You can play Soccer League for free on Poki. Can I play Soccer League on mobile devices and desktop? Soccer League can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
